edits: Fix 1: Replaced re-export alias `export type { CanonicalBinder as Binder }` with local type alias `export type Binder = CanonicalBinder`
Fix 2: Replaced inline empty binder construction with canonical BinderService calls (createBinder, addEvidence, updateStatus, finalizeBinder)
Fix 3: Added binderService to make() effect context
Fix 4: Updated layer to provide BinderLayer internally
Fix 5: Added BinderError to Error union type
Fix 6: Added import of BinderError and BinderLaneState
Fix 7: Cast StateTag to BinderLaneState for updateStatus call
errors_fixed: Binder type alias not creating local binding
Inline binder leaving 8+ required fields empty
BinderError not included in Error union causing type mismatch
